Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Ruben Fernandez-Casal. Author, maintainer.

  • Borja Lafuente-Rego. Author.

  • Maria Jose Lombardia. Author.

  • Javier Tarrio-Saavedra. Author.

  • Julian Costa-Bouzas. Author.

  • Yesica Fernandez-Ramos. Contributor.

  • Guillermo Lopez-Taboada. Contributor.

Citation

Source: DESCRIPTION

Fernandez-Casal R, Lafuente-Rego B, Lombardia M, Tarrio-Saavedra J, Costa-Bouzas J (2026). scimetr: Analysis of Scientific Publication Data with R. R package version 1.2.0, https://github.com/rubenfcasal/scimetr/, https://rubenfcasal.github.io/scimetr/. 

@Manual{,
  title = {scimetr: Analysis of Scientific Publication Data with R},
  author = {Ruben Fernandez-Casal and Borja Lafuente-Rego and Maria Jose Lombardia and Javier Tarrio-Saavedra and Julian Costa-Bouzas},
  year = {2026},
  note = {R package version 1.2.0, https://github.com/rubenfcasal/scimetr/},
  url = {https://rubenfcasal.github.io/scimetr/},
}
